repo_prior_art.cite: Q1_MinimalBasis: FWL coefficient decompositions for binary switch-on TWFE contamination, not a continuous-dose dCDH/TWFE ACR row

published_prior_art.cite: deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2023SeveralTreatments: TWFE coefficients decompose into own-treatment and other-treatment contamination; no dCDH/DHS equality row

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: rank-zero IF frontier for event-study estimators, not continuous-dose DHS/dCDH/TWFE ACR functionals

published_prior_art.cite: DHaultfoeuilleHoderleinSasaki2023 identifies continuous-treatment effects; deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuillePasquierSowVazquezBare2025 identifies switcher slopes; CallawayGoodmanBaconSantAnna2024 analyzes continuous-treatment TWFE, but none gives a three-method iff equality frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: adjacent score-frontier idea for binary/event-study IFs, not shared DHS/dCDH/TWFE continuous-dose tangent-space scores

published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakJaravelSpiess2024 gives robust and efficient event-study imputation, but does not compare DHS, dCDH, and continuous-dose TWFE in one local tangent space

repo_prior_art.cite: Q1_SignFlip and Q1_SpectralThreshold give binary-panel TWFE sign/separation phenomena, not continuous-dose DHS/dCDH/TWFE open-set separation

published_prior_art.cite: CallawayGoodmanBaconSantAnna2024 and deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2023SeveralTreatments give TWFE warning/decomposition results, not open-set separation among DHS, dCDH, and TWFE with a score frontier

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The converse says K_score nonzero, or a nonzero orthogonal score difference, implies a distinct first-order variance; nonzero score differences can have equal information norm unless a variance-gap or covariance condition is added.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Patch Conjecture 2 by replacing the converse variance claim with distinct projected scores, or add an explicit nonzero variance-gap condition using the Conjecture 3 variance identity.

Make the flagship threshold more visibly computable by stating exactly which observable matrices determine r_DHS,dCDH, r_dCDH,TWFE, and K_score, rather than defining them mainly as Riesz rows of the gaps.
Add deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuilleVazquezBare2024 no-stayers to the formal checklist for Theorem 1 because the proposal uses it as the concrete downstream workflow.

recommended_next_step: Revise the Conjecture 2 converse so score non-equivalence and variance non-equivalence are separated by an explicit variance-gap condition.
